title: Funds
doc_html:
§1503.  Funds

All funds appropriated to or available for use by the Louisiana State University School of Vocational Agriculture are hereby transferred to and shall be used by the Dean Lee Agricultural Center.

Added by Acts 1956, No. 57, §2.
